name: Trishula, the Dragon of Icy Imprisonment
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> トリシューラ
desc:
3 monsters with different names
Must first be either Fusion Summoned using only monsters in your hand and/or field, or Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. If this card was Special Summoned using only monsters that were originally Dragons: You can reveal and banish 3 cards (1 from your Deck, 1 from the top of your opponent's Deck, and 1 from their Extra Deck). You can only use this effect of "Trishula, the Dragon of Icy Imprisonment" once per turn.

action: Applies effects if Special Summoned using specific Fusion Material
Reveals from the top of your opponent's Deck
summoning: Requires monsters with different names as Fusion Materials
Can be Special Summoned either by Fusion Summon or Contact Fusion
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
Banishes from your opponent's Extra Deck
